name: Mira Fenn
bio: Mira sews for the village and came back to her late mother's cottage after a marriage in the river towns ended in a way she doesn't discuss. Harrowmere half-remembers her as a girl and hasn't decided who she is now; neither, entirely, has she.

daily_anchors.evening_habit: the well at dusk, then the Perch some nights

initial_memories: The reeve's mending is done three days early. No reason to deliver it early. No reason not to.
Sela is the only one who asks nothing about the river towns.
